message.content:
@startuml

skinparam ParticipantPadding 5
skinparam BoxPadding 5

box "VideoSink" #White
participant "SurfaceViewRenderer" as SVR
participant "ProxyVideoSink" as PVS
participant "VideoSinkWrapper" as VSW
participant "VideoBroadcaster" as VB
end box

box "VideoDecoder" #White
participant "MediaCodecVideoDecoderStream" as MCVDS
participant "IncomingVideoStream" as IVS
participant "VideoStreamDecoder" as VSD
participant "VCMDecodedFrameCallback" as VDFC
participant "VideoDecoderCallback" as VDC
participant "AndroidVideoDecoder" as AVD
participant "VideoDecodeAndFrameCallbackWrapper" as VDFCW
participant "VCMGenericDecoder" as VCMGD
end box

box "VideoReceiver" #White
participant "VideoReceiver" as VR
participant "VideoRtpDecompressionHandler" as VRDH
participant "VideoRtpReceiver" as VRR
end box

box "RTPReceiver" #White
participant "RtpDemuxer" as RD
participant "RtpStreamReceiverController" as RSRC
participant "RtpStreamReceiver" as RSR
end box

box "Transceiver" #White
participant "RtpTransport" as RT
participant "SrtpTransport" as ST
participant "webrtcDtlsTransport" as WDT
end box

box "DTLS" #White
participant "DtlsTransport" as DT
participant "AsyncUDPSocket" as AUP
end box

== Receive RTP ==

AUP -> DT : OnReadPacket()

note right of AUP
  RecvFrom()
  MakeReceived
  ...
  readcb()
end note

DT -> DT : SignalReadEvent
activate DT
DT -> DT : OnReadPacket()
DT -> DT : HandleIncomingPacket()
deactivate DT

DT -> WDT : UDPPort : OnReadPacket()
DT -> WDT : PacketTransportInternal() : OnReadPacket()
WDT -> WDT : ProcessConnection : OnReadPacket()

WDT -> ST : webrtcDtlsTransport : OnReadPacket()
ST -> ST : RtpTransport::OnReadPacket()

note left of ST
  SrtpTransportInternal()
  RtpTransport
  DtlsSrtpTransport
  SrtpTransport
  (DtlsSrtpTransport)
end note

ST -> RT : RtpTransport : OnRtpPacketReceived()

RT -> RD : OnRtpPacket()

RD -> RSR : OnRtpPacket()

note right of RSR
  RtpStreamReceiver()
  (RtpVideoStreamReceiver2)
  OnRtpPacket()
end note

RSR -> RSR : OnRtpPacket()
RSR -> RSRC : OnRtpPacket()
RSRC -> RSRC : OnRtpPacket()

== Receive Video ==

RSR -> RSR : OnRtpPacket()

activate RSR
RSR -> RSR : ReceivePacket()
RSR -> RSR : OnReceivedPayloadData()
RSR -> RSR : OnAssembledFrame()
RSR -> RSR : OnCompletePacket()
deactivate RSR

VRDH -> VRDH : OnRtpPacket()

RSR -> VRR : VideoRtpReceiver : OnCompleteFrame()
VRR -> VRR : InsertFrame() : FrameBuffer

note over VRR : RESUME

VRR -> VRR : HandleEncodedFrame()
VRR -> VRR : VideoReceiver2 : Decode()

VRR -> VCMGD : VCMGenericDecoder : Decode()
VDFCW -> VDFCW : VideoDecodeAndFrameCallbackWrapper : Decode()
AVD -> AVD : AndroidVideoDecoder : qbFrame()
VDC -> VDC : VideoDecoderCallback : qbDecodedFrame()
VDFC -> VDFC : VCMDecodedFrameCallback : Decoded()
VSD -> VSD : VideoStreamDecoder : FrameToRender()
IVS -> IVS : IncomingVideoStream : OnFrame()

note left of IVS
  OnFrame()
  ...
end note

IVS -> IVS : StartNewDecoder()

MCVDS -> VB : OnFrame()
VB -> VB : VideoBroadcaster : OnFrame()
VSW -> VSW : VideoSinkWrapper : OnFrame()
PVS -> PVS : ProxyVideoSink : onFrame()
SVR -> SVR : SurfaceViewRenderer : onFrame()

@enduml
